title: Finn and the Lost Baby Elephant
synopsis: A young boy named Finn discovers a lost baby elephant in the savanna and helps reunite it with its family through a heartwarming adventure filled with animal friends.

pages.text: Finn loved exploring the golden savanna near his home. The grass swayed in the warm breeze, and colorful birds sang in the acacia trees. Today felt special, like an adventure was waiting!

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes walking through tall golden savanna grass with thick brushstrokes. Acacia trees dot the landscape under an orange sunset sky. Colorful birds perch on branches in gouache painting style with warm savanna colors.
illustration.alt: Finn exploring the golden savanna grasslands

pages.text: Behind a big baobab tree, Finn heard a soft trumpeting sound. 'Hello?' he called out. A tiny gray trunk poked out from behind the tree, followed by the biggest, saddest brown eyes Finn had ever seen.

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes standing near a massive baobab tree. A small baby elephant with expressive sad brown eyes peeks out from behind the tree trunk. Painted in gouache with textured painterly strokes and warm orange sunset lighting.
illustration.alt: Finn discovering a baby elephant hiding behind a baobab tree

pages.text: It was a baby elephant! The little elephant was all alone and looked very scared. 'Don't worry, little one,' Finn said gently. 'I'm Finn. Are you lost?' The baby elephant nodded and made a small, worried trumpet sound.

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes kneeling down next to a small baby elephant. The elephant looks worried but curious about Finn. Bold confident gouache brushstrokes capture their first meeting in golden grass under warm savanna colors.
illustration.alt: Finn meeting the lost baby elephant

pages.text: 'My name is Kesi,' the baby elephant whispered. 'I was following a butterfly and got lost from my mama and papa. I don't know how to get home!' Finn patted Kesi's trunk softly. 'Don't worry, Kesi. We'll find your family together!'

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes gently patting the baby elephant Kesi's trunk. Kesi looks hopeful now. A colorful butterfly flutters nearby in the golden grass. Painted with thick brushstrokes in gouache with expressive animals and warm sunset colors.

pages.text: Finn and Kesi walked through the savanna together. They met a wise old giraffe named Jabari. 'Have you seen Kesi's family?' Finn asked. Jabari stretched his long neck high and looked far across the plains. 'I see elephant tracks heading toward the watering hole!'

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes walking alongside baby elephant Kesi. A tall giraffe with expressive eyes stretches his neck high above them. The scene is painted in gouache with bold confident strokes, golden grass, and warm savanna colors under an orange sunset.
illustration.alt: Finn, Kesi, and Jabari the giraffe looking for the elephant family

pages.text: At the watering hole, they found a family of zebras. 'We saw a herd of elephants earlier!' said Zara the zebra. 'They went that way, toward the big hill!' Kesi trumpeted excitedly. 'That sounds like my family!'

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes and baby elephant Kesi by a blue watering hole. A family of zebras with bold black and white stripes points toward distant hills. Painted with textured painterly gouache strokes in warm savanna colors with golden grass.
illustration.alt: Meeting the zebra family at the watering hole

pages.text: As they climbed the hill, Kesi heard familiar trumpeting sounds. 'Mama! Papa!' she called out. Two big elephants came running with their whole family behind them. 'Kesi!' they trumpeted joyfully. 'We've been looking everywhere for you!'

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes watching as baby elephant Kesi runs toward two large parent elephants. A whole herd of expressive elephants approaches in the background. Painted in gouache with thick brushstrokes and warm orange sunset lighting across golden grass.
illustration.alt: Kesi reuniting with her elephant family

pages.text: Kesi's parents thanked Finn for helping their little one. 'You're a true friend,' said Mama Elephant. As the sun set over the savanna, Finn waved goodbye to his new elephant friends. He couldn't wait for his next adventure!

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes waving goodbye to the elephant family as they walk away together. The orange sunset paints the sky in warm colors over the golden savanna grass. Painted in gouache with bold confident strokes and textured painterly style.
illustration.alt: Finn saying goodbye to the elephant family at sunset

metadata.illustrationStyle: gouache painting, thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors, expressive animals, textured painterly, golden grass, orange sunset, bold confident strokes

questions.question: What was the baby elephant's name?
questions.explanation: The baby elephant told Finn her name was Kesi when they first met.

questions.question: How did Kesi get lost?
questions.explanation: Kesi explained that she was following a butterfly and got lost from her mama and papa.

questions.question: Which animal helped them first?
questions.explanation: Jabari the wise old giraffe was the first animal to help by looking far across the plains with his long neck.

questions.question: Where did they find Kesi's family?
questions.explanation: The zebras told them the elephants went toward the big hill, and that's where they found Kesi's family.
